message:
fix: bd dep list cross-rig routing broken from town root (bd-ciouf)

`bd dep list <issue>` failed with 'no issue found' when run from town
root for rig-level issues because it resolved IDs against the local DB
only. Apply the same routing pattern used by `bd show`: check
needsRouting() in daemon mode, use resolveAndGetIssueWithRouting() in
direct mode, and query dependencies from the routed store.

Also passes the correct store to resolveExternalDependencies so
cross-rig external refs resolve against the right database.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/quartz
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
